text:
Part D) 2007-2010 

*Note: No MA and PDP CAHPS survey administration occurred in 2020. 

This data dictionary is presented in two volumes (indicated by Version 2 on the title page). Volume 1 contains content 
specific to the Medicare Advantage (MA) and Prescription Drug Plan (PDP) CAHPS surveys. Volume 2 contains content 
specific to the Original Medicare survey. Other data dictionaries are presented in a combined format (indicated by Version 
1 on the title page).
